hero.badge: Halifax's Best Realtor — as voted by his mom
hero.headline:
Find your perfect
home in Halifax.
hero.description: Personalized real estate service with expert market knowledge, dedicated guidance, and a commitment to making your buying or selling journey smooth and stress-free.

servicesPreview.title: Real estate services for every step
servicesPreview.subtitle: Whether you're buying your first home, selling your property, or exploring the Halifax market, I'm here to guide you through every step.

whyChooseUs.title: A realtor who actually cares
whyChooseUs.subtitle: I take the time to understand your needs and work tirelessly to make your real estate goals a reality.

items.title: Local Market Expert
items.description: Deep knowledge of Halifax neighborhoods, pricing trends, and hidden gems across the region.

items.title: Transparent Guidance
items.description: Honest advice with no pressure. I'll give you the facts and let you make the best decision for your family.

items.title: Personalized Service
items.description: Every client gets my full attention. Your search isn't just another transaction — it's your future home.

items.title: End-to-End Support
items.description: From the first showing to closing day and beyond, I'm with you every step of the way.

process.title: Your journey made simple
process.subtitle: Buying or selling a home doesn't have to be stressful. Here's how we'll work together.

steps.title: Let's Chat
steps.description: Tell me about your goals, timeline, and budget. No obligation — just a friendly conversation.

steps.title: Find or List Your Home
steps.description: I'll curate listings that match your criteria or prepare your property to stand out on the market.

steps.title: Close with Confidence
steps.description: From negotiations to paperwork, I handle the details so you can focus on what matters.

serviceArea.title: Proudly serving Halifax and beyond
serviceArea.subtitleTemplate: Based in {primary} and serving surrounding communities across the HRM.
serviceArea.footerNote: Don't see your area? Give me a call — I'm happy to help across Nova Scotia.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to make your move?
ctaBanner.description: Whether you're buying, selling, or just curious about the Halifax market, let's talk. Free consultation, no pressure, just real advice.
